auth.approvalHint: An admin must approve access. This usually takes a short time.

facebook.title: Facebook
facebook.subtitle: Connect Facebook Lead Ads and receive leads in Telegram
facebook.onboardingSubtitle: Connect your company, pages, and forms to receive leads in Telegram.
facebook.testLeadTitle: Create a test lead in Meta
facebook.testLeadStep1: Open Meta Lead Ads Testing Tool
facebook.testLeadStep5: Check webhook event in diagnostics below
facebook.testLeadStep6: Verify the lead in LeadBridge and Telegram
facebook.testLeadCta: Open Meta Lead Ads Testing Tool
facebook.hintNoPages: No pages? Check your role in Business Manager
facebook.hintNoForms: No forms? Create an Instant Form in Ads Manager
facebook.hintNoWebhook: No webhook? Check Page leadgen subscription
facebook.hintNoLeads: No leads? Create a test lead in Meta Testing Tool
facebook.advancedSettingsDesc: Meta App ID, Secret, and Webhook Token for advanced setup
facebook.onboardingSubtitle: Connect your company, pages, and forms to receive leads in Telegram.
facebook.advancedSettingsDesc: Meta App ID, Secret, and Webhook Token for advanced setup
facebook.resetConnectionDesc: Removes tokens, pages, and forms. Leads and logs are kept.
facebook.tokenInvalid: Facebook token is invalid. Please reconnect Facebook.
facebook.diagnosis_fully_connected: Page access granted. You can connect pages and enable forms.
facebook.diagnosis_connected_profile_only: Facebook account is connected, but the token has no page access.
facebook.diagnosis_missing_pages_show_list: pages_show_list permission was not granted. Reconnect Facebook and allow page access.
facebook.diagnosis_missing_business_assets: Business Login Configuration ID and business_management are required. Set Configuration ID in Meta App settings and reconnect Facebook.
facebook.diagnosis_no_pages_available: Permissions granted, but no pages were selected during OAuth. Reconnect and select company/pages in the Meta dialog.
facebook.diagnosis_token_invalid: Token is invalid or expired. Please reconnect Facebook.
facebook.loginConfigHint: Set Facebook Login Configuration ID in Meta App settings above — without it Meta may not request Business Manager page access.
facebook.webhookDiagnosticsDesc: Meta webhook verification status and recent leadgen events
facebook.webhookNotVerifiedHint: Meta has not verified the webhook yet. Check Callback URL and Verify Token in Meta → Webhooks → Page.
facebook.pagesAccessMissing: Facebook is connected, but page access was not granted. Check your Business Login Configuration and select company/pages when connecting.
facebook.pagesAccessMissingHint: Create a Configuration in Meta → Facebook Login for Business, enter the Configuration ID in Meta App settings, then reconnect Facebook and select your company and pages.
facebook.debugPermissionsDesc: Scopes: {scopes}. Pages: {pages}. Granular page IDs: {granular}. Login Config ID: {hasConfig}
facebook.noPages: No pages found. Click Refresh pages after connecting Facebook.
facebook.permissions: Permissions: public_profile, email, pages_show_list, pages_read_engagement, leads_retrieval, ads_read, pages_manage_ads, business_management
facebook.setupSubtitle: Follow the steps below — everything is done through the UI
facebook.step1Desc: Sign in with Facebook and grant access to pages and leads
facebook.step2Desc: Choose pages you want to receive leads from
facebook.step3Desc: Go to Forms and enable the lead forms you need
facebook.step4Desc: Set up a bot to receive new lead notifications
facebook.step5Desc: New leads will automatically arrive in Telegram
facebook.metaNotReadyDesc: Enter Meta App details in the form below — secrets are stored encrypted.
facebook.metaSetupDesc: Enter App ID and App Secret from developers.facebook.com. All secrets are encrypted and never shown in the UI.
facebook.instruction1: Click Connect Facebook — Meta authorization window will open
facebook.instruction2: Grant access to your pages and leads
facebook.instruction4: Enable pages with the Connect page button
facebook.instruction5: Go to Forms and enable lead forms
facebook.instruction6: Set up Telegram in the Telegram section
facebook.webhookDesc: Set this URL in Meta App → Webhooks → Page → leadgen (for production)
facebook.redirectDesc: Set this URL in Meta App → Facebook Login → Settings
facebook.loadError: Failed to load data. Please refresh the page.
facebook.oauthFailed: Facebook connection failed. Please try again.

oauthErrors.invalid_state: Connection session expired. Please connect Facebook again.
oauthErrors.invalid_config_id: Invalid Facebook Login Configuration ID. Use a numeric Meta config ID only.
oauthErrors.invalid_app_secret: Invalid Meta App Secret. Check META_APP_SECRET in environment or settings.
oauthErrors.redirect_uri_mismatch: OAuth redirect URI does not match Meta App settings.
oauthErrors.missing_code: Authorization code missing or expired. Connect Facebook again.
oauthErrors.missing_permissions: Facebook did not grant required permissions. Reconnect and approve all scopes.
oauthErrors.token_exchange_failed: Failed to exchange Facebook authorization code for a token.
oauthErrors.sync_failed: OAuth succeeded but forms sync failed.

facebook.loginConfigCardMissingHint: Set META_LOGIN_CONFIG_ID in platform environment for Facebook Login for Business.
facebook.formsSyncAfterOAuthFailed: Facebook connected, but forms sync failed. Use Sync on the Forms page.
facebook.diagnosisMsg_missing_pages_show_list: Facebook connected, but page list access was not granted. Reconnect and allow pages_show_list.
facebook.diagnosisMsg_missing_leads_retrieval: LeadBridge cannot retrieve leads without leads_retrieval. Add it in Meta App and reconnect Facebook.
facebook.diagnosisMsg_pages_empty_with_scopes: Facebook access granted, but no pages are available. Check your role in Business Manager and Business Login Configuration.
facebook.diagnosisMsg_missing_business_assets: Business Login Configuration or business_management is missing. Set numeric Configuration ID and reconnect.
facebook.diagnosisMsg_token_invalid: Facebook token is invalid. Reconnect Facebook.
facebook.pageLimitedAccessWarning: You may not have full page access. Check your role in Business Manager.
facebook.businessesDesc: Business Portfolios available to your Facebook account
facebook.businessesEmpty: No business portfolio found or access was not granted
facebook.businessesMissingWarning: Pages are available, but Business Portfolio access was not granted.
facebook.pagesEmptyWarning: Facebook is connected, but no pages were found. Check Business Login Configuration and pages_show_list/business_management permissions.
facebook.connectSectionDesc: Sign in with Facebook — permissions are requested automatically
facebook.manualSubtitle: Step-by-step guide from app creation to receiving leads
facebook.manualToggleDesc: Expand to view the full Facebook Lead Ads setup manual
facebook.manualStep1Item1: Open developers.facebook.com and sign in to Facebook
facebook.manualStep1Item2: Click Create App → choose Other → Business
facebook.manualStep1Item3: Enter a name (e.g. ukrasim.by) and contact email
facebook.manualStep1Item4: In Settings → Basic, copy the App ID
facebook.manualStep1Tip: App ID is a public identifier — safe to enter in LeadBridge
facebook.manualStep2Item1: Add the Facebook Login for Business product to your app
facebook.manualStep2Item3: Paste the OAuth Redirect URI from LeadBridge into Valid OAuth Redirect URIs
facebook.manualStep2Tip: Redirect URI must match exactly — including http/https and /api/facebook/callback path
facebook.manualStep3Item1: Open the Webhooks section in your app dashboard
facebook.manualStep3Item2: In the product dropdown, select Page — NOT User
facebook.manualStep3Item3: Paste the Webhook URL from LeadBridge into Callback URL
facebook.manualStep3Item4: Enter the same token as in LeadBridge → Webhook Verify Token in Verify Token field
facebook.manualStep3Item5: Click Verify and Save, then subscribe to the leadgen field
facebook.manualStep3Warning: Meta cannot reach localhost. For local development, webhooks won't work without a tunnel (ngrok). OAuth and page connection work on localhost.
facebook.manualStep3Tip: Verify token is your own password — invent it and use the same value in LeadBridge and Meta
facebook.manualStep4Item1: Meta App ID — paste from Basic settings in Meta Developers
facebook.manualStep4Item2: Meta App Secret — click Show in Meta and paste here (stored encrypted)
facebook.manualStep4Item3: Webhook Verify Token — invent a string, e.g. LeadBridge_my_secret_2026
facebook.manualStep4Item5: Ensure Meta App status shows Configured
facebook.manualStep5Item1: Click Connect Facebook on this page
facebook.manualStep5Item2: Sign in to Facebook and grant access to pages and leads
facebook.manualStep5Item3: After successful connection, click Refresh pages
facebook.manualStep5Item4: Enable needed pages with the Connect page button
facebook.manualStep6Item1: Go to Forms and click Sync forms
facebook.manualStep6Item2: Enable needed lead forms with the toggle
facebook.manualStep6Item3: Go to Telegram, create a bot via @BotFather and enter token and Chat ID
facebook.manualStep6Item4: Send a test message to verify
facebook.manualStep7Item1: Deploy LeadBridge on Railway or another host with a public URL
facebook.manualStep7Item2: Update OAuth Redirect URI and Webhook URL in Meta to production addresses
facebook.manualStep7Item3: Switch Meta app from Development to Live mode (after Meta review)
facebook.manualStep7Warning: In Development mode, leads are only accepted from test users added to the Meta app
facebook.manualStep8Item1: Meta App not configured — fill App ID and Secret, click Save and Test
facebook.manualStep8Item2: OAuth error — check Redirect URI in Meta Login (must match LeadBridge)
facebook.manualStep8Item3: Webhook won't verify — token in Meta and LeadBridge must match; public URL required
facebook.manualStep8Item4: Pages won't load — reconnect Facebook and check pages_show_list permission
facebook.manualStep8Item5: Leads not arriving — ensure webhook subscribed to leadgen, form enabled, Telegram configured
facebook.wikiCardDesc: Detailed manual for Facebook, Telegram and lead delivery setup

forms.title: Lead forms
forms.subtitle: Manage forms for lead collection
forms.importLeadsDescription: Download all leads from enabled forms
forms.marketingEnableFormsHint: Enable only forms where your manager should receive leads — not every form at once.
forms.marketingImportHint: Historical import does not replace webhooks. New leads need Page leadgen subscription.
forms.marketingArchivedFormHint: Archived Meta forms can be imported, but new leads will not arrive via webhook.
forms.noForms: No forms found. Connect Facebook pages first.
forms.noFormsDesc: Go to Facebook, connect your account and refresh pages
forms.importTelegramPartial: Some leads were not sent to Telegram: {telegramFailed}

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.subtitle: Configure bot for notifications
telegram.chatIdHint: Chat or channel ID for notifications
telegram.botSetupDesc: Enter bot token and Chat ID for lead notifications
telegram.howToStep2: Add the bot to your chat or channel
telegram.howToStep3: Use @userinfobot or @getidsbot to get Chat ID

wiki.title: Knowledge Base
wiki.subtitle: Complete LeadBridge setup guide — from Meta App to receiving leads in Telegram
wiki.noResults: Nothing found. Try a different query.
wiki.sectionOverviewDesc: LeadBridge is a SaaS platform for automatically delivering Facebook Lead Ads to Telegram
wiki.sectionOverviewItem1: Connect Facebook Lead Ads via OAuth
wiki.sectionOverviewItem3: Configure a Telegram bot for notifications
wiki.sectionOverviewItem4: New leads automatically arrive in Telegram in real time
wiki.sectionQuickStartDesc: Minimum path from registration to first lead
wiki.sectionQuickStartItem1: Register and sign in to LeadBridge
wiki.sectionQuickStartItem2: Create a Meta App and fill in fields in the Facebook section
wiki.sectionQuickStartItem5: Configure Telegram bot and send a test message
wiki.sectionMetaDesc: Creating an app in Meta for Developers and obtaining keys
wiki.sectionMetaItem2: App Settings → Basic: copy App ID, App Secret; set App Domains to your domain
wiki.sectionMetaItem3: Add Privacy Policy URL and User Data Deletion URL
wiki.sectionMetaItem4: Facebook Login for Business → Settings → Valid OAuth Redirect URIs: https://your-domain/api/facebook/callback
wiki.sectionMetaItem5: Facebook Login for Business → Configurations → create config → copy numeric Configuration ID
wiki.sectionMetaItem6: Enable permissions: public_profile, email, pages_show_list, pages_read_engagement, leads_retrieval, pages_manage_ads, ads_read, business_management
wiki.sectionMetaItem7: Webhooks → Product: Page → Callback URL: https://your-domain/api/webhooks/meta → Verify Token → subscribe to leadgen
wiki.sectionMetaTip: App Secret is stored encrypted (AES-256) and never displayed after saving
wiki.sectionOAuthItem1: In Meta → Facebook Login → Settings, add OAuth Redirect URI from LeadBridge
wiki.sectionOAuthItem3: Grant access to pages, leads and ads
wiki.sectionOAuthItem4: After connecting click Refresh pages and enable needed ones
wiki.sectionOAuthTip: Redirect URI must match exactly — including protocol and /api/facebook/callback path
wiki.sectionWebhooksDesc: Configuring notifications for new leads from Meta
wiki.sectionWebhooksItem1: In Meta App open Webhooks → select Page product
wiki.sectionWebhooksItem2: Paste Webhook URL from LeadBridge into Callback URL
wiki.sectionWebhooksItem3: Enter Webhook Verify Token — same as in LeadBridge
wiki.sectionWebhooksWarning: Meta requires a public HTTPS URL. For local development use a tunnel (ngrok) or Docker Compose.
wiki.sectionWebhooksTip: Verify Token is your own password — invent it and use the same value in LeadBridge and Meta
wiki.sectionTelegramDesc: Creating a bot and receiving lead notifications
wiki.sectionTelegramItem1: Open @BotFather in Telegram and create a bot with /newbot
wiki.sectionTelegramItem2: Copy bot token and paste in LeadBridge → Telegram
wiki.sectionTelegramItem3: Add bot to chat or channel where leads should arrive
wiki.sectionTelegramItem5: Save settings and send a test message
wiki.sectionFormsItem2: Click Sync forms to load from Facebook
wiki.sectionFormsItem3: Enable needed forms with the toggle
wiki.sectionLeadsDesc: Lead journey from Facebook to Telegram
wiki.sectionLeadsItem1: User fills out a lead form on Facebook/Instagram
wiki.sectionLeadsItem2: Meta sends a webhook notification to LeadBridge
wiki.sectionLeadsItem3: LeadBridge fetches lead data via Graph API
wiki.sectionLeadsItem4: Lead is saved and sent to Telegram
wiki.sectionLeadsItem5: Delivery status shown in Leads and Logs sections
wiki.sectionProductionDesc: Moving from localhost to production server
wiki.sectionProductionItem1: Deploy LeadBridge on Railway, VPS or other hosting
wiki.sectionProductionItem2: Update OAuth Redirect URI and Webhook URL in Meta to production address
wiki.sectionProductionItem3: Ensure Redis is available — it is required for the job queue and lead processing
wiki.sectionProductionItem4: Switch Meta App to Live mode after Meta review
wiki.sectionProductionWarning: In Development mode Meta only accepts leads from test users added to the app
wiki.sectionTroubleshootDesc: Common errors and how to fix them
wiki.sectionTroubleshootItem1: Meta App not configured — fill App ID and Secret, save and test
wiki.sectionTroubleshootItem2: OAuth error — check Redirect URI in Meta Login
wiki.sectionTroubleshootItem3: Webhook won't verify — token match + public URL required
wiki.sectionTroubleshootItem5: Leads not arriving — webhook leadgen + form enabled + Telegram configured
wiki.sectionTroubleshootItem6: Telegram delivery error — check bot token and Chat ID
wiki.glossaryAppIdDef: Public identifier of your Meta app. Found at developers.facebook.com → Settings → Basic.
wiki.glossaryAppSecretDef: Secret key of your Meta app. Never share it. Stored encrypted in LeadBridge.
wiki.glossaryWebhookTokenDef: Arbitrary password string for webhook verification. Must match in LeadBridge and Meta.
wiki.glossaryLeadgenDef: Meta webhook subscription field for receiving notifications about new leads from lead forms.
wiki.glossaryChatIdDef: Unique identifier of a Telegram chat or channel where the bot sends notifications.

integrations.title: Meta (Facebook) Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Configure Facebook Lead Ads connection through the UI
integrations.metaAppIdHint: Find in Meta for Developers → Your App → Settings → Basic
integrations.metaLoginConfigIdHint: Meta Developers → Facebook Login for Business → Configurations → copy Configuration ID. Without it, OAuth may not request Business Manager page access.
integrations.webhookTokenHint: Choose any token and use the same in Meta → Webhooks
integrations.secretStored: Secret saved and encrypted. Leave empty to keep current.
integrations.securityNote: All secrets (App Secret, Webhook Token, Facebook and Telegram tokens) are encrypted with AES-256 and never shown in the UI.
integrations.metaChangeWarning: Changing Meta App ID, App Secret, or Login Configuration ID requires reconnecting Facebook.
integrations.testFailed: Verification failed. Check App ID and App Secret.
integrations.tooltipMetaAppId: Public identifier of your Meta app. Found at developers.facebook.com → Your App → Settings → Basic → App ID. This is not a secret key.
integrations.tooltipMetaLoginConfigId: Facebook Login for Business configuration ID. Meta Developers → Facebook Login for Business → Configurations → create a configuration with Pages/Lead Ads permissions → copy Configuration ID.
integrations.tooltipMetaAppSecret: Secret app key. Found in the same place — click Show next to App Secret. Never share it. In LeadBridge it's stored encrypted (AES-256) and never displayed after saving.
integrations.tooltipWebhookToken: Any password string you invent. Enter it here AND in Meta → Webhooks → Verify Token. Both values must match exactly. Example: LeadBridge_ukrasim_2026
integrations.tooltipRedirectUri: Add this URL in Meta → Facebook Login → Settings → Valid OAuth Redirect URIs. Meta redirects users here after authorization.
integrations.tooltipWebhookUrl: Set this URL in Meta → Webhooks → Page → Callback URL. Meta sends new lead notifications here. For localhost you need a tunnel (ngrok).
integrations.instruction1: Open developers.facebook.com and create a Business app
integrations.instruction2: Add Facebook Login for Business product
integrations.instruction3: Copy App ID and App Secret into the form above
integrations.instruction4: Set OAuth Redirect URI and Webhook URL from fields below in Meta App settings
integrations.platformManagedTitle: Meta App is managed by the platform
integrations.platformManagedDesc: To connect Facebook, use the Connect button on the Facebook page. Advanced keys are configured by the service administrator.
integrations.instruction5: Subscribe to leadgen field in Webhooks → Page

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.csrf: Security error. Please refresh the page.
errors.invalidFacebookToken: Facebook token is invalid. Please reconnect Facebook.

help.connect: Facebook Login for Business — LeadBridge requests only required permissions.
help.business: Business Portfolio is your company in Meta Business Manager.
help.adAccount: Ad account is where Lead Ads campaigns run — needed for spend and CPL audit.
help.page: Facebook Page is the lead source — webhook requires a connected page.
help.leadForm: Lead Form is the ad lead capture form — enable sync for forms you use.
help.webhook: Webhook notifies LeadBridge instantly when a new lead is created.
help.telegram: Telegram delivers new leads to your manager chat.
help.audit: Audit shows if ad spend is efficient and where leads are lost.
help.diagnostics: Technical checks for admin and support.
help.leads: All Meta leads with campaign attribution and CRM status.
help.permissions: Meta needs pages, leads_retrieval, ads_read for full integration.
help.pageMissing: A page may be hidden if your Facebook user has no role on it in Business Manager.
help.leadAccess: Business Manager → Pages → assign people → enable Leads access.

invalid_app_secret.user: Meta connection is temporarily unavailable. The administrator has been notified.
invalid_app_secret.admin: Invalid Meta App Secret. Check META_APP_SECRET.

missing_permissions.user: Facebook is connected but missing permissions. Reconnect Meta and approve access.

no_pages.user: No pages found. Check page access in Business Manager.

no_ad_accounts.user: No ad accounts found. Check Ads Manager access.

webhook_not_verified.user: Webhook is not verified yet. Contact support.
webhook_not_verified.admin: Check Callback URL and Verify Token.

token_exchange_failed.user: Could not complete Meta connection. Try again or contact support.

oauth_exception.user: Meta temporarily rejected the connection. Please try again.

metaAds.adAccountsDesc: Ad Accounts from your Facebook profile (isolated per user)

metaAds.auditPositioning: LeadBridge shows which ad campaigns actually generate leads.

metaAds.kpiConversionHint: Share of clicks that became leads
metaAds.leadSyncDesc: Lead gap between Meta reporting and LeadBridge delivery
metaAds.chartEmpty: Not enough data for a chart
metaAds.emptyNoAccountsDesc: Connect Meta and sync ad accounts.
metaAds.emptyNoDataDesc: Meta returned no data for this period.

recommendations.recAdZeroLeads: "{name}" spent {spend} {currency} with 0 leads. Review or pause.
recommendations.recLowCtr: CTR below 1%. Try a new creative.
recommendations.recNoLeadsPeriod: No new leads. Check forms and campaigns.

metaAds.marketingScoreDesc: Overall ad performance and lead delivery score
